name: Turtle Pie 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely grind the chocolate wafer cookies in a processor.
2. Transfer the ground cookies to a bowl and mix in melted unsalted butter until combined.
3. Press the cookie mixture into a 9-inch pie dish. Allow it to freeze for at least 20 minutes to set.
4. Spread the chocolate fudge topping evenly over the bottom of the crust.
5. Spoon the pecan-praline ice cream over the fudge topping, smoothing the top.
6. Place the pie in the freezer and allow it to firm up for at least 4 hours or overnight.
7. Once firm, spread the butterscotch sauce over the ice cream layer.
8. Sprinkle the chopped pecans evenly over the butterscotch sauce.
9. Using a pastry bag fitted with a medium star tip, pipe decorative swirls of whipped cream around the edge of the pie.
10. Serve and enjoy your Turtle Pie.
